WelcomeBody1: You are about to begin your first lesson. Each lesson contains {0} questions — one from each of the six cognitive skill categories.
WelcomeBody2: Your progress is tracked and shown in your personal statistics after each lesson set.
CausalReasoningDesc: Causal Reasoning tests your ability to identify cause-and-effect relationships and avoid confusing correlation with causation.
CognitiveReflectionDesc: Cognitive Reflection measures your tendency to override an initial gut response and engage in deeper, more analytical thinking.
ConfidenceCalibrationDesc: Confidence Calibration assesses how accurately you gauge your own certainty — neither overconfident nor underconfident.
MetacognitionDesc: Metacognition is thinking about your own thinking — understanding what you know and don't know, and how you learn.
ReadingComprehensionDesc: Reading Comprehension evaluates how well you extract meaning, draw inferences, and critically evaluate written information.
ShortTermMemoryDesc: Working Memory questions test your ability to hold and manipulate information over brief time periods.
